articles.title: Bitcoin ETF Issuers Now Hold A Record 5% Of The Total BTC Supply, Catalyst For A Surge?
articles.description: New reports have revealed that Spot Bitcoin ETF issuers now hold almost 5% of BTC’s total supply. This milestone underscores the growing demand and rapid expansion of Spot BTC ETFs in the market, offering institutional investors a relatively low-risk means to acquire BTC. The surge in demand could also catalyze a potential increase for BTC. […]

articles.title: Solana vs. XRP: Who Will Win the Next ETF Race?
articles.description: The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has greenlit two types of cryptocurrency ETFs (Exchange-Traded Funds) this year. Initially, spot Bitcoin (BTC) ETFs gained approval, followed by Ethereum (ETH) ETFs in recent months. With these approvals, speculation has surged in the market regarding which cryptocurrency will be the next to secure an ETF approval, whether it's Solana (SOL),...

articles.title: Bitcoin Set for Major Upsurge, Predicts Prominent Macro Strategist
articles.description: Macro strategist Henrik Zeberg anticipates a substantial increase in Bitcoin’s value, forecasting a surge of over 64% by the third quarter of 2024. According to a report by The Daily Hodl, in a recent interview with Bloor Street Capital, Zeberg expressed confidence in Bitcoin reaching between $110,000 and $115,000 within the year. He emphasized that […]

articles.title: Bitcoin misses key resistance flip as BTC price falls below $68K
articles.description: BTC price action shows sensitivity to Mt. Gox events, leaving $69,000 unclaimed as new support — to the frustration of Bitcoin bulls.

articles.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETNs Hit London Stock Exchange Trading Floor
articles.description: Investors in the UK can now trade exchange-traded products that track Bitcoin and Ethereum through the London Stock Exchange, as the country narrows the gap with other financial leaders in digital assets.

articles.title: Big Day in the Cryptocurrency World: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs to Start Trading in the UK
articles.description: Following the launch of Bitcoin and Ethereum Spot ETFs in the USA, this time the UK is introduced to these products. Continue Reading: Big Day in the Cryptocurrency World: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs to Start Trading in the UK

articles.title: ETF Approval Marks Key Milestone
articles.description: MicroStrategy Chairman Michael Saylor says Bitcoin ETF approvals mark a major milestone but criticizes the SEC's restrictive approach to the crypto industry.

articles.title: Mt. Gox moves $840 million in Bitcoin to new wallet
articles.description: Defunct crypto exchange Mt. Gox transferred 12,240 BTC, valued at approximately $840 million, to a new wallet over the past hour, according to data from Arkham Intelligence. Following the transfer, Bitcoin's price experienced a minor dip, with the crypto trading around $68,500.Mt.
